title: ESP32-C3 LiPo battery monitor
prompt: I'm building a battery-powered ESP32-C3 sensor. It runs off a single-cell LiPo that swings from about 3.0 V empty to 4.2 V full. I want the ESP32-C3 to read the pack voltage on one of its ADC pins and log it, but the ADC input can never be allowed to go above the chip's 3.3 V limit. Wire up the sensing front-end.
